data.title: KuCoin Launches xStocks, Bringing Tokenized Equities Like Tesla and S&P 500 to Crypto
data.description:
TL;DR KuCoin introduces xStocks, a new product line of tokenized equities, providing access to top US stocks like Tesla and the S&P 500 ETF through the Solana blockchain. Each token is fully backed by real shares secured in regulated custodial accounts. With over 41 million users globally, KuCoin aims to make diversified, flexible, and borderless. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/kucoin-launches-xstocks-bringing-tokenized-equities-like-tesla-and-sp-500-to-crypto/

data.title: Coinbase hits new high of $436 as insiders offload $230 million in shares this week
data.description:
Coinbase stock soared to a new all-time high of $436 during early trading on July 18, driven by renewed investor confidence following significant legislative wins for the crypto industry. According to Yahoo Finance data, this is the highest price for Coinbase shares since the company debuted on the Nasdaq in 2021.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/coinbase-hits-new-high-of-436-as-insiders-offload-230-million-in-shares-this-week/

data.title: Meme Coin Market Explodes 51% to $83B Since June, BONK and PENGU Lead Weekly Gains
data.description:
The meme coin market has surged 51% to $83. 5 billion since June 30, with BONK leading weekly gains at 50. 4% and Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) climbing 43. 2% as the sector experiences its strongest rally since April 2025.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/meme-coin-market-explodes-51-to-83b-since-june-bonk-and-pengu-lead-weekly-gains/

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $936 million, both long and short positions have exploded
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has a liquidation of US$936 million, with both long and short positions liquidated, of which long positions are US$469 million and short positions are liquidated US$467 million.
In addition, in the past 24 hours, ETH liquidated US$259 million and BTC liquidated US$173 million.

data.title: Public Companies Increase ETH, XRP, SOL Holdings as Part of Growing Treasury Strategies: Animoca Brands
data.description:
Public companies are increasingly adding altcoins like Ether (ETH), Solana’s SOL, and XRP to their treasury strategies, according to a new report from Animoca Brands Research.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/public-companies-increase-eth-xrp-sol-holdings-as-part-of-growing-treasury-strategies-animoca-brands/

data.title: Big Pharma joins crypto with a private placement for $100 Million Litecoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
MEI Pharma announced Friday a $100 million private investment in public equity (PIPE) transaction to add Litecoin into its corporate treasury. The announcement is the first known instance of a publicly traded biotech company adopting Litecoin (LTC) as its primary reserve asset. Per a press statement published at 13:00 BTS, the investment round was led […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/big-pharma-in-crypto-100m-litecoin-treasury/

data.title: GENIUS Act Reshapes Stablecoin Strategy, Says Foresight Ventures Partner
data.description:
The GENIUS Act has cleared Congress, reshaping U. S. stablecoin oversight and prompting Ripple and Circle to apply for bank charters. Investment expert Alice Li explains this move as future-proofing operations amid rising regulatory pressure, with the sector expected to split into institutional and DeFi camps
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/genius-act-reshapes-stablecoin-strategy-says-foresight-ventures-partner/

data.title: Could Arctic Pablo Coin Be Binance’s Next Big Move Amid Book Of Meme and Dogs’ Bold Moves
data.description:
Crypto circles have been heating up lately, and there’s one name that’s got folks buzzing: Arctic Pablo Coin. Word on the street is that this narrative-driven meme coin might be heading straight to Binance once its 36-stage presale wraps up in the next four weeks. That’s right—APC, the coin that’s been quietly gaining momentum with. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/could-arctic-pablo-coin-be-binances-next-big-move-amid-book-of-meme-and-dogs-bold-moves/

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Rates are expected to fall sharply in the next year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee said the latest consumer price index data showed that tariffs pushed up commodity inflation, and he was "slightly concerned" about this. 
"It pains me to see the debate about the independence of the Federal Reserve. Interest rates are expected to fall significantly in the coming year." (Jinshi)

data.title: Canadian listed company Bitcoin Treasury Capital increased its holdings by 4.5 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 156 bitcoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Canadian listed company Bitcoin Treasury Capital announced that it purchased 4.5 bitcoins for approximately $500,000 (or 5 million Swedish kronor), with an average purchase price of $118,338 per bitcoin.
As of July 18, 2025, it holds a total of approximately 156 bitcoins. The approximately 5 million Swedish kronor raised from the additional share issuance on July 9 has not yet been used and will all be used to purchase bitcoins.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Capital Acquires Additional Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Canadian publicly traded company Bitcoin Treasury Capital has purchased 4.5 bitcoins for approximately $500,000, or 5 million Swedish Krona, at an average price of $118,338 per bitcoin. As of July 18, 2025, the company holds around 156 bitcoins in total. The funds raised from a share issuance on July 9, amounting to about 5 million Swedish Krona, remain unused and are intended for further bitcoin acquisitions.

data.title: Trump will sign the GENIUS Act today and it will officially become law
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: White House official BoHines posted on the X platform that Trump will sign the GENIUS Act today to make it law.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Official Highlights Cryptocurrency Rules' Impact on Dollar
data.description: According to Odaily, a U.S. Treasury official has stated that the implementation of cryptocurrency regulations will further solidify the U.S. dollar's position as the standard currency. The official emphasized the importance of the private sector in educating the public about stablecoins.

data.title: Trump to Sign GENIUS Act into Law
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is set to sign the GENIUS Act into law today, as confirmed by White House officials. This legislative move marks a significant development in the administration's policy agenda.

data.title: A whale withdrew about 19,500 ETH from FalconX, and the cumulative withdrawal of more than 120,000 ETH in the past week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale address 0x9684 has again withdrawn 19,550 ETH (worth $70.7 million) from FalconX, and a total of 122,691 ETH (worth $443.68 million) has been withdrawn in the past week.

data.title: AguilaTrades and James Wynn Adjust Cryptocurrency Positions
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens monitoring has revealed significant changes in cryptocurrency trading positions. AguilaTrades has closed its long position on Bitcoin, which was leveraged at 20 times, and has initiated a short position on Ethereum with 15 times leverage. Additionally, James Wynn has opened a short position on Bitcoin with 40 times leverage.

data.title: James Wynn opened a 40-fold short position in Bitcoin, with a liquidation price of $120,178
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, James Wynn recently opened a 40x short position in Bitcoin, with an opening price of $119,226.20 and a liquidation price of $120,178.26. The current floating profit is $236,400.

data.title: US Treasury Undersecretary: Cryptocurrency rules further solidify the dollar as the standard currency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Treasury Deputy Secretary said that cryptocurrency rules further consolidate the U.S. dollar as a standard currency, and the private sector must educate the public about stablecoins. (Jinshi)

data.title: How Jack Dorsey’s new app lets you chat without the internet and why it matters
data.description:
Unlike traditional messaging apps that rely on internet infrastructure, Bitchat operates on direct device-to-device communication.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/explained/how-jack-dorseys-new-app-lets-you-chat-without-the-internet-and-why-it-matters?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum ACDE meeting: decided to remove EIP 7907 from Fusaka upgrade
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Christine Kim summarized the minutes of the 216th Ethereum Executive Core Developers Meeting (ACDE) and showed that today developers decided to remove EIP 7907 from the Fusaka upgrade, which means that there will be no changes to Ethereum's smart contract code size limit in the foreseeable future. A version of this EIP may be re-proposed for the Glamsterdam hard fork, but there is no guarantee that it will be included in the next hard fork. In addition, Tim Beiko shared a possible timetable for Fusaka's launch on the mainnet at the meeting. The proposed timetable is as follows: 1. Client public testnet release: the week of August 25; 2. First public testnet upgrade: September 22 to October 3; 3. Second testnet upgrade: October 6 to 10. ; In addition, developers plan to launch Fusaka Devnet-3 on July 23. 
Regarding the Glamsterdam hard fork, developers have generally reached a consensus on what they plan to implement. However, they are still discussing several key issues about how the fork, which includes the "proposer-builder separation solidification mechanism" and "block-level access list", will be implemented. After further consultation with the wider Ethereum community, developers plan to make a final decision on the core code changes in the Glamsterdam upgrade in the next two to four weeks.
